appLanguage.title: Application Language

common.aiOptimizationFailed: AI optimization failed, please check configuration

actions.editDescription: Modify the transcribed text for this history entry

details.emptyHint: Use the shortcut key to start your first transcription
details.title: History

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: English only. The best model for English speakers.
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2

punct-zh-en-ct-transformer-2024-04-12.description: Adds punctuation and sentence breaks for zh+en mixed text. Larger model; more accurate but slower. Updated 2024-04-12.
punct-zh-en-ct-transformer-2024-04-12.name: Punctuation (Chinese + English) Large

punct-zh-en-ct-transformer-2024-04-12-in.description: Adds punctuation and sentence breaks for zh+en mixed text. Int8; fast and small. Updated 2024-04-12.
punct-zh-en-ct-transformer-2024-04-12-in.name: Punctuation (Chinese + English)

inline.closeConfirmMessage: Content has been modified. Confirm close?

modelSelector.downloadPrompt: Download a model below to get started with transcription.

realtimeModel.empty: No eligible local models. Download (and favorite) a Sherpa model first.
realtimeModel.offHint: No need to show live captions for local models (saves memory resources)
realtimeModel.title: Realtime transcription model

accessibility.description: This permission enables automatic text pasting
accessibility.feature2: Get cursor position for overlay placement
accessibility.noteImpact: Without permission, results are copied to clipboard only.
accessibility.reason1: Automatically paste transcribed text into active apps
accessibility.reason2: Get cursor position for overlay positioning
accessibility.simpleDesc: Auto-paste transcription results, no need for Cmd+V
accessibility.step1: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility
accessibility.step2: Remove the app if already listed
accessibility.step3: Click + to add and enable the permission
accessibility.title: Accessibility Permission
accessibility.without2: Transcribed text is copied to clipboard

microphone.denied: Microphone permission is required to record voice. Please grant permission in System Settings.
microphone.description: Votype needs access to your microphone to record voice
microphone.error: Failed to request permission. Please try again or grant manually in System Settings.
microphone.grantFirst: Please grant microphone permission to continue
microphone.reason3: Your voice data never leaves your device
microphone.title: Microphone

models.description: Select a model to get started. Recommended models work well for most use cases.

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: English only. The best model for English speakers.
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2

models.title: Choose a Model

onboarding.subtitle: To get started, choose a transcription model

welcome.description: A voice input method that supports local, online, or hybrid modes.
welcome.feature2: Privacy first, data never leaves your device
welcome.title: Welcome

whisper.description: High-performance inference of OpenAI's Whisper automatic speech recognition model
whisper.details: Votype uses Whisper.cpp for fast, local speech-to-text processing. Thanks to the amazing work by Georgi Gerganov and contributors.
whisper.title: Whisper.cpp

appDataDirectory.description: Location where Votype stores its data
appDataDirectory.title: App Data Directory

recordingsDirectory.description: Location where audio recordings are saved
recordingsDirectory.title: Recordings Directory

autostart.description: Automatically start Votype when you log in to your computer.
autostart.label: Launch on Startup

clipboardHandling.description: Don't Modify Clipboard preserves your current clipboard contents after transcription. Copy to Clipboard leaves the transcription result in your clipboard after pasting.
clipboardHandling.title: Clipboard Handling

customWords.description: Add words that are often misheard or misspelled during transcription. The system will automatically correct similar-sounding words to match your list.
customWords.title: Custom Words

vocabularyCorrections.description: Vocabulary corrections learned from your edit history
vocabularyCorrections.title: Vocabulary Dictionary

modelUnload.description: Automatically free GPU/CPU memory when the model hasn't been used for the specified time
modelUnload.title: Unload Model

overlay.description: Display visual feedback overlay during recording and transcription. On Linux 'None' is recommended.
overlay.title: Overlay Position

pasteMethod.description: Choose how text is inserted. Direct: simulates typing via system input. None: skips paste, only updates history/clipboard.
pasteMethod.title: Paste Method

punctuation.description: Adds punctuation to the final transcript ({{model}}).
punctuation.label: Add Punctuation

model.description: Choose a punctuation model for zh+en mixed text. Only applied to the final result.
model.notDownloaded: Selected model is not downloaded yet.
model.title: Punctuation Model

startHidden.description: Launch to system tray without opening the window.
startHidden.label: Start Hidden

autoSubmit.title: Auto Submit
autoSubmit.description: Automatically send the selected key combination after text insertion. Cmd+Enter applies on macOS, while Windows/Linux use Super+Enter.

translateToEnglish.description: Automatically translate speech from other languages to English during transcription.
translateToEnglish.descriptionNoModel: Select a local model to enable translation.
translateToEnglish.descriptionNonWhisper: Translation only works with Whisper models. Current: {{model}}
translateToEnglish.descriptionUnknownModel: This model's capabilities are unknown. Select a downloaded model to enable translation.
translateToEnglish.descriptionUnsupported: Translation is not supported by the {{model}} model.
translateToEnglish.label: Translate to English

addSection.description: Paste a model URL. The app will infer the model type from the filename.
addSection.title: Install

asrModels.description: Manage local transcription models and control which ones appear in the quick selector.

install.description: Enter the URL of the model archive (tar.gz, tar.bz2, etc).
install.editDescription: Update the name or tags for this model.
install.removeConfirm: Remove this custom model? This will also delete any downloaded files.
install.title: Add Custom Model

library.description: Pick favorites to show in the quick selector.
library.title: Library

pipeline.description: Global post-processing that can be applied automatically after transcription.
pipeline.itnHint: Inverse text normalization: basic formatting (e.g. numbers).
pipeline.punctuationHint: Uses the selected punctuation model to add sentence breaks.
pipeline.punctuationModelHint: Choose which punctuation model to use.
pipeline.title: Pipeline

quickSettings.description: These apply globally. Delete punctuation models in the library below.
quickSettings.title: Quick Settings

asrModels.title: Local Models

alwaysOnMicrophone.description: Keep microphone active for faster response
alwaysOnMicrophone.label: Always-On Microphone

appendTrailingSpace.description: Add a space after pasted transcription
appendTrailingSpace.label: Append Trailing Space

clamshellMicrophone.description: Microphone to use when laptop lid is closed
clamshellMicrophone.title: Clamshell Microphone

destroySettingsWindowOnClose.description: When closing the settings window, destroy it (free resources). Reopen from the tray menu.
destroySettingsWindowOnClose.label: Destroy Settings Window on Close

historyLimit.description: Maximum number of history entries to keep
historyLimit.title: History Limit

logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored
logDirectory.title: Log Directory

offlineVadRealtime.intervalDescription: Force a realtime refresh every N ms (0 to disable).
offlineVadRealtime.windowDescription: When total audio exceeds 30s, realtime decoding uses the last N seconds when there are no VAD segments.

postProcessingToggle.description: Enable AI-powered text refinement after transcription
postProcessingToggle.label: Post Processing

recordingRetention.description: How long to keep audio recordings
recordingRetention.title: Recording Retention

soundTheme.description: Choose a sound theme for recording start and stop feedback
soundTheme.label: Sound Theme

updateChecks.description: Automatically check for new versions of Votype
updateChecks.label: Check for Updates

audioInputAutoEnhance.description: Automatically lift quiet voice input and limit distortion during recording. This may change playback sound.
audioInputAutoEnhance.label: Microphone Auto Enhance

language.description: Select the language for speech recognition. Auto will automatically determine the language, while selecting a specific language can improve accuracy for that language.
language.descriptionNoModel: Select a local model to configure language.
language.descriptionSenseVoice: SenseVoice applies language when the model loads. Re-select the model after changing language.
language.descriptionUnknownModel: Current model is unknown; language selection is disabled.
language.descriptionUnsupported: Parakeet model automatically detects the language. No manual selection is needed.
language.descriptionUnsupportedEngine: Language selection only applies to Whisper or SenseVoice models.
language.title: Language

tooltip.summary: Choose how the recording shortcut is triggered

descriptions.toggle: Press to start, press again to stop
descriptions.hold: Hold to record, release to stop
descriptions.hold_or_toggle: Quick press toggles, hold 300ms+ stops on release

invoke_skill.description: Starts recording in Skill mode with intelligent intent routing.
invoke_skill.name: Invoke Skill

paste_first_entry.description: Pastes the first history entry to the active window.
paste_first_entry.name: Paste First Entry

shortcut.description: Configure keyboard shortcuts to trigger speech-to-text recording

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

shortcut.title: Votype Shortcuts

history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.
history.empty: No transcriptions yet. Start recording to build your history!
history.title: History

apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.
apiKey.title: API Key

appleIntelligence.description: Runs fully on-device. No API key or network access is required.
appleIntelligence.requirements: Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later. Apple Intelligence must be enabled in System Settings.
appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence

baseUrl.description: API base URL for the selected provider. Only the custom provider can be edited.
baseUrl.title: Base URL

model.descriptionApple: Provide an optional numeric token limit or keep the default on-device preset.
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the model identifier expected by your custom endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a model exposed by the selected provider.
model.title: Model

deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this model? This action cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.title: Delete Model?

provider.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the provider "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
provider.title: Provider

deleteConfirm.description: This will remove the provider and any associated models.
deleteConfirm.title: Delete provider?

empty.description: Add a provider to get started.
empty.title: No providers

fields.baseUrlHint: OpenAI compatible mode, usually ends with /v1. Use '#' suffix to bypass /v1 auto-append.
fields.name: Provider Name
fields.v1MissingWarning: URL may be missing version path (e.g. /v1)

intentModel.description: Model used for skill intent detection. Leave it as default to follow the main post-processing model.
intentModel.title: Intent Model

inputInjection.title: Automatic Inputs
inputInjection.description: Control which helper inputs are automatically attached to post-processing or translation requests.
inputInjection.summaryEnabled: History context injection is enabled, with up to {{count}} entries attached.
inputInjection.summaryDisabled: No history context will be attached automatically.

history.description: Provide recent transcriptions from the current app as context for post-processing.
history.limitDesc: Attach up to the last {{count}} history entries to post-processing.

streaming.description: Send streaming_output alongside the final text to help disambiguate ASR results.

hotwords.description: Attach hotwords, terminology, and common misrecognition mappings to post-processing.

appRules.assignedAppsDescription: The applications listed below will use this profile settings.

context.description: Allow LLMs to reference the recent history of the current application to improve transcription and correction accuracy.
context.limitDesc: The model will reference the last {{count}} entries from this app as context.
context.title: Context-Aware Processing

appRules.createPromptHint: Add an application rule to get started
appRules.noAppsAssigned: No apps mapped to this profile yet.

policyDesc.always: Always show review window for apps in this profile.
policyDesc.auto: Triggers review if text changes significantly (based on threshold).
policyDesc.never: Never show review window for apps in this profile.

appRules.profilesDescription: Create profiles to apply specific processing logic or prompts to different groups of apps.
appRules.promptDescription: Select a custom prompt to use for transcriptions in this profile.
appRules.selectPrompt: Select a profile from the sidebar to edit

shortcuts.description: You can use keyboard shortcuts to trigger specific profiles or manage rules.
shortcuts.title: Shortcuts & Usage

appRules.title: Application Rules

confidenceCheck.description: Adjust the sensitivity for prompts that have review enabled. Higher values mean the review window appears less often.
confidenceCheck.thresholdHint: Scores above this value will trigger the review window.
confidenceCheck.title: Auto-Review Sensitivity

textModelMode.title: Post-processing Mode
textModelMode.multiDescription: Select models in the list below for parallel comparison
textModelMode.multiStrategyManualHint: Show all candidates for manual selection
textModelMode.multiStrategyLazyHint: Wait 3s for preferred model, auto-select on timeout

lengthRouting.enableDescription: Use a fast model for short text, an advanced model for long text
lengthRouting.thresholdDescription: By Unicode characters (1 Chinese character = 1, 1 English letter = 1)

postProcessing.disabledNotice: Post processing is currently disabled. Enable it to configure.

enabled.description: Provide a main transcript and a secondary realtime transcript to post-processing for comparison and disambiguation.
enabled.label: Use realtime transcript (fusion)

secondaryModel.description: Only used when Online ASR is enabled. This local model provides realtime subtitles and the secondary transcript.
secondaryModel.title: Realtime transcription model (Online ASR)

deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this model? This action cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.title: Delete Model?

models.description: Add and manage models used for post-processing.

empty.title: No models configured

selectModel.description: Choose a model to add or enter one manually.
selectModel.title: Select Model

models.title: Models

prompts.createFirst: Click 'New Prompt' above to create your first AI Text Optimization prompt.

deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt? This action cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.title: Delete Prompt

prompts.nameAndContentRequired: Name and content cannot be empty
prompts.fillNameAndInstructionsFirst: Please fill in the name and instructions first so AI can generate a better summary.

resetConfirm.description: This will restore the skill to its original built-in content. Any customizations will be lost.
resetConfirm.title: Reset to Default

prompts.skillLocked: This skill is locked. Unlock to edit.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.description: Current prompt has unsaved changes. Switching will discard these modifications.

prompts.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this Skill does and when it should be triggered
prompts.generationDescription: Generates new content based on the recognized text as a prompt (e.g., translation, summarization).
prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Describe how the model should process the input text, what it may change, what it must not change, and what the final output should look like.
prompts.promptBodyPlaceholder: Describe how the model should process the input text, what it may change, what it must not change, and what the final output should look like.
prompts.promptTip: Tip: You are editing the task body only. The system automatically injects the main input and supporting reference fields. When you need precise control, you can explicitly reference the primary fields in the body.
prompts.refinementDescription: Automatically corrects and formats the recognized text.

selectedPrompt.description: Choose the template used for post-processing, or create a new one. The system automatically injects the main input and supporting reference fields, so the prompt body only needs to describe the task, constraints, and output requirements.
selectedPrompt.title: Selected Prompt

prompts.selectToEdit: Select a prompt above to view and edit its details.
prompts.title: Prompt
prompts.autoInjectedNote: The system automatically injects the main input and supporting reference fields. If you need more precise control, you can explicitly reference them in the task body.
prompts.explicitReferenceNote: If you explicitly reference a field above, the system will not append the same field again later in the prompt.
prompts.fieldInputTextDesc: The only primary text that should be processed
prompts.fieldAsrReferenceDesc: Auxiliary ASR reference used for correction and disambiguation
prompts.fieldSelectedTextDesc: Selected text used as weak context
prompts.fieldProductNamesDesc: Known product, brand, or organization names
prompts.fieldDomainTermsDesc: Domain terms, abbreviations, or technical terms
prompts.fieldHistoryHintsDesc: History hints used only for term consistency and weak disambiguation
prompts.varContextDesc: Historical context from the active window.

autoGenerate.title: Voice-to-Skill
autoGenerate.description: Describe what you want in natural language. AI will generate a complete Skill for you.
autoGenerate.placeholder: e.g. Help me polish text, fix grammar and make it more professional...
autoGenerate.emptyInput: Please describe what this Skill should do

prompts.commandPrefixDescription: Command prefix to trigger this prompt

skills.createHint: Create .md files in ~/.votype/skills/ to add custom skills
skills.enabledInFile: Skill is always enabled (configure in file)
skills.helpText: Create .md files with YAML frontmatter in the skills folder. They will be automatically loaded and available for use.

postProcessing.title: Post Process

audioFeedback.description: Play sound when recording starts and stops
audioFeedback.label: Audio Feedback

outputDevice.description: Select your preferred audio output device for feedback sounds

volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

hotWords.description: Add words that are often misheard. The system will auto-correct.
hotWords.title: Hot Words

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Deletion

aiAnalysis.title: AI Analysis
aiAnalysis.clickToGenerate: Click to generate AI analysis of your activities
aiAnalysis.empty: Click 'Generate' to get AI-powered insights about your activities.

accentColor.description: Choose the accent color used throughout the app
accentColor.title: Accent Color

panelStyle.description: Choose between translucent or solid panels
panelStyle.title: Panel Style

review.description: The transcription may contain errors. Please review and edit if needed.
review.hint: ⌘/Ctrl + Enter to confirm, Escape to cancel
review.insertStabilityHint:
Shortcut: {{shortcut}}
